response.justification: Sarah has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tooling (test runners, CI/CD, fluent asserts), and a clear passion for engineering productivity, but lacks explicit evidence of people management experience and mobile platform expertise, which are core to the role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record in open-source tooling and technical education (workshops, talks, libraries)
Broad technical stack across mobile, web, and embedded systems with clear automation focus
concerns: No clear evidence of 2+ years in people management or team leadership
Mobile experience is incidental (iOS app takeover) rather than platform-level infrastructure work
Resume uses inconsistent name (Sarah Smith vs. Bogdan Szabo) and lacks managerial achievements
